Wiki / Countries

Countries

Global expansion is the single biggest income lever in the game. Every country you unlock multiplies all of your income at once.

How it works

Global expansion

Unlocks at Level 15

Global Expansion opens at Level 15. Each country is then bought with cash.

Multiplies everything

Country bonuses apply to all income — manual blends and passive alike.

Diminishing returns

The combined country multiplier is scaled down slightly as it grows, so you can't stack them to infinity — but more is always better.

Global Outreach

Marketing research adds ×1.03 / ×1.06 / ×1.10 on top of your country multiplier.

Reference

35Mars×120$5e16

Unlocking a country also grants +30 XP — the single largest per-action XP source in the game.
